resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived MCM6/LCT rs4988235 CT call is available for lactase-persistence context. This is not a diagnosis, symptom explanation, diet recommendation, supplement recommendation, lab interpretation, metabolic result, or model-derived health result.
resultRows.description: This local evidence row is included because the fixture supplies a derived marker call for educational lactose-related context.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This marker can provide lactose-related context, but symptoms, diet history, labs, environment, medications, and professional review matter for health and nutrition decisions.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Hunger Perception Accuracy: sample label High Accuracy. The sample report labels hunger perception accuracy as High Accuracy and frames the trait around sensing true hunger cues.
resultRows.description: The local Mosaic Biodata sample PDF page 5 presents this as an observed report-output row.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This is an observed Mosaic Biodata sample-output row used to preserve report structure. It is not a local result and must not be used as personal diet, supplement, lab, glucose, fitness, methylation, medication, diagnosis, or treatment advice.

biodataContext: Use this report as educational biodata genetics context, not as lab interpretation or a health plan.
Treat Mosaic sample rows as examples of report structure unless the local run supplies equivalent validated evidence.
Review labs, wearable data, diet history, activity, symptoms, medications, medical history, and goals with qualified professionals when making decisions.
Do not use genotype alone to infer detoxification, prescribe diets, create workouts, recommend supplements, interpret glucose or methylation status, change medication, or guide treatment.

missingInputs: Authenticated marketplace body/detail extraction has not been captured for Mosaic Biodata.
No calibrated biodata, lab, wearable, meal-plan, supplement, fitness, detox, symptom, metabolic, glucose, methylation, medication, or ancestry applicability model is supplied with this fixture.

Broader symptoms, food history, diet history, activity history, labs, medications, medical history, child-specific context, ancestry applicability, environment, and professional assessment are not represented in this fixture.
Sample-only Mosaic rows are not local genotype evidence or personal health findings.
uncertainty: Nutrition, lifestyle, symptoms, labs, weight, glucose, gut health, supplement response, methylation, fitness, and wellness outcomes depend on genetics plus non-genetic context and professional review.
A single marker should not be used to diagnose conditions, explain symptoms, prescribe diets, recommend supplements, interpret labs, guide workouts, change medication, or guide treatment.
Mosaic sample labels are source-bound examples of report structure and are not calibrated probabilities for this local fixture.
limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data is not included.

The report is educational and does not integrate clinical labs, prescribe diets, create workouts, recommend supplements, infer detoxification, diagnose symptoms, infer metabolic disease, interpret glucose or methylation status, change medication, or provide treatment guidance.
Authenticated Sequencing.com marketplace body/detail extraction remains pending, so this is sample-backed output structure, not formal-equivalent parity.
